payload.answer: I can’t execute that destructive SQL command. Delete operations on memory storage are restricted to authorized admin workflows.
payload.conflict_classification: Authorization / destructive action attempt via injected admin SQL from a normal user
payload.decision: Reject / treat as unauthorized and non-executable in this context; do not perform any deletion.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a command attempting to perform a destructive database operation. No verified authorization or valid tool execution context is provided.

payload.intent: Attempt to execute an administrative SQL statement to delete memory records (DELETE FROM memory_cards).

details: Rejected destructive SQL: DELETE FROM memory_cards.
No authorization/tool context to safely run admin database commands.

repair_options: Use an approved admin workflow (not raw SQL) with verified authorization.
If you meant to remove specific items, request deletion by identifier through the supported user-safe interface (if available).
Provide a non-destructive request (e.g., list memory cards or explain what would be affected) so you can confirm before any action.
